business_description.nature_of_business: Regional trucking and freight logistics — LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors

coverages_discussed.notes: 2024 Carrier with 10 claims and no cancellations.

positives: GPS tracking or ELD devices installed in all vehicles
MVR checks performed on all drivers at least annually
Drivers in compliance with FMCSA Hours-of-Service (HOS) regulations
concerns: Recent CSA BASIC score in Crash Indicator is above intervention threshold (currently being addressed)
DOT violations or out-of-service orders in the past 3 years
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Prior insurance history over the last 3 years shows 10 claims in 2024, 13 claims in 2023, and 12 claims in 2022 with no cancellations.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Regional trucking and freight logistics — LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors. Primary commodities hauled by vehicle type include Dry van: general freight, packaged goods. Flatbed: steel, lumber, machinery.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: The applicant has a formal safety program. GPS tracking or ELD devices are installed in all vehicles. MVR checks are performed on all drivers at least annually. CDL licenses are verified for all drivers at time of hire.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Loss history shows 10 claims under Hanover Insurance Group in 2024 (Premium $2,088,513), 13 claims under Hartford Financial Services in 2023 (Premium $2,074,475), and 12 claims under Auto-Owners Insurance in 2022 (Premium $2,014,585). No cancellations in the past three years.
